items.name: omnigent
items.description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.

items.name: studio
items.description: Open-source control plane for your AI agents. Connect tools, hire agents, track every token and dollar

items.name: openai-agents-js
items.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows and voice agents

items.name: openai-agents-python
items.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows

items.name: webjs
items.description: The web framework built for AI agents

items.name: loki-mode
items.description: Multi-agent autonomous SDLC framework. Spec to deployed app. PRD, GitHub issue, OpenAPI/JSON/YAML, or one-line brief. 5 AI providers, 11 quality gates.

items.name: last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

items.name: homelab-monitor
items.description: Plug-and-play homelab dashboard in one container — GPU, local-AI VRAM, Docker, systemd, host health. Built-in read-only MCP server so AI agents can explore it too.

items.name: agmsg
items.description: Cross-vendor messaging for CLI AI coding agents — let Claude Code, Codex, Gemini & Copilot talk to each other in one team. Bash + SQLite, no daemon, no framework.

items.name: maestro-flow
items.description: Workflow orchestration CLI with MCP endpoint support and multi-agent dashboard
